articles.title: Patriots coach Mike Vrabel says he’s ‘positive’ contract situation with second-round pick Gabe Jacas will get resolved
articles.description:
FOXBOROUGH — Patriots coach Mike Vrabel said he is “positive” the contract situation with second-round pick Gabe Jacas will get resolved. “Hopefully, we’ll get him in here sooner rather than later,” Vrabel said Friday at the New Balance Athletics Center. “I’m not going to put a timeline on it or a time frame. I’ve spoken […]
